overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V showing a first-person perspective walking along a busy multi-lane highway. The camera travels along the left shoulder with moderate traffic passing by, then crosses the road to continue along the right shoulder. The scene features clear summer weather, green hillsides, and various vehicles including sedans, trucks, and a motorcycle.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the left highway shoulder next to the metal guardrail

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking in the right lane

entered.detail: silver metal guardrail running parallel to the highway separating opposite traffic
tall lattice steel electrical transmission tower
large overhead highway sign gantry structure
grass-covered hillside with scattered trees and bushes

segments.scene_description: Walking along the left shoulder of a multi-lane highway on a clear summer day. A metal guardrail runs along the left side separating from opposite traffic, while vehicles pass by on the right. In the distance, a tall electrical transmission tower and highway sign structure are visible against the blue sky.

events.description: ego begins moving laterally from left shoulder across traffic lanes toward the right side

agents.ego_description: crossing the highway from left to right shoulder between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: white box truck passing through the lane being crossed

entered.detail: large advertising billboard on the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves laterally across the highway lanes from the left shoulder to the right shoulder. A white box truck passes through the crossing path, and the metal guardrail is left behind as the perspective shifts to the right side of the road with the hillside now much closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway right shoulder with steep hillside

events.description: motorcycle overtakes in the right lane passing close to the shoulder

agents.ego_description: walking along the right highway shoulder with steep hillside on the right and traffic on the left

notable_agents.action: motorcycle overtaking in the right lane

entered.detail: concrete utility pole with street light arm
dense green shrubs and vegetation on the hillside slope
red wooden barn or building visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the right shoulder of the highway with a steep grassy hillside and dense bushes immediately to the right. Traffic passes by on the left including a motorcycle that overtakes around the 30-second mark. A red barn becomes visible in the distance on the left side, and the transmission tower remains visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a multi-lane highway that shifts from the open left shoulder to the enclosed right shoulder. It begins by walking beside a metal guardrail under a clear summer sky, with traffic passing on the right and a distant electrical transmission tower visible ahead. As the camera moves laterally across the highway lanes, a white box truck passes through the path before the perspective settles on the opposite shoulder. The scene then shifts to a closer proximity with a steep grassy hillside and dense bushes immediately to the right, while traffic now flows on the left. Finally, the camera continues forward as a motorcycle overtakes and a red barn emerges in the distance, all while the transmission tower remains a focal point on the horizon.
